action.reasoning: Observation: DLinear trained for 20 epochs on CPU, best val loss 1.215777. Training took ~15 min. No eval submitted yet. Analysis: Need to submit eval to get baseline MSE score before making improvements. Key improvements to try: (1) RevIN (Reversible Instance Normalization) is known to greatly help non-stationary TS, (2) individual=True for per-channel linear layers, (3) potentially use Chronos-Bolt-Small for zero-shot forecasting. Decision: Submit eval on current model immediately to get baseline score.
